scripts.dev: concurrently --names "B1,B2,FE,IMG" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend-1" "npm run dev --prefix backend-2" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix image-analyzer"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend-1 && npm install --prefix backend-2 && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix image-analyzer && npm install
